nodes.summary: ALL AppProject overlays and bootstrap template MUST include external-secrets in spec.destinations
infra-contract-test-fast MUST include a guard test failing when any AppProject overlay is missing external-secrets
Guard MUST check all four environment overlays and bootstrap template AppProject file
Adding external-secrets destination MUST NOT expand namespaceResourceWhitelist or clusterResourceWhitelist
Guard failure message MUST identify the specific AppProject file and missing namespace
All five AppProject files contain namespace: external-secrets under spec.destinations
make infra-contract-test-fast passes with guard green
Guard fails when external-secrets removed from any AppProject destinations (regression guard)
Issue #108 sync failure resolves at next ArgoCD re-sync
Issue #109 Degraded health from AppProject namespace gap resolves at next ArgoCD re-sync
